articles.author: Joanna Slater
articles.content: LEWISTON, Maine On arecent weekday afternoon, a 41-year-old single mother from South Africa who had arrived in the United States this spring as a refugee pulled into a coffee shop in central Maine.
articles.description: America’s refugee program has undergone a radical transformation. Now nearly all those arriving under the program are White South Africans.
articles.title: 6,000 refugees entered the U.S. since October. All but 3 are South African.
